ValidationRule.description: The Driver Assignment can not submit for approval if the current status is not Ready to Submit.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Driver_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Driver_Status__c, 'Completed'), NOT(ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Driver_Status__c), 'Ready to Submit')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Driver Assignment is not yet ready to submit. Make sure the Start Date/Time and End Date/Time are populated.
